papers.title_en: Noninvasive prediction of coronary artery disease progression using pericoronary adipose tissue radiomics from coronary CTA
papers.tldr: 冠状动脉疾病（CAD）的进展是导致心血管死亡的关键因素。本研究利用冠状动脉CT血管造影（CTA）图像，开发了一种基于冠状动脉周脂肪组织（PCAT）的影像组学模型。该模型通过提取脂肪组织的纹理特征，实现了对CAD进展的无创预测，为早期识别高风险患者和制定干预策略提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Objective Coronary artery disease (CAD) progression is directly associated withmajor adverse cardiovascular events and death. This study aimed to construct apericoronary adipose tissue (PCAT) radiomics model to predict subsequent …

papers.title_en: Preoperative CT-Based Habitat Radiomics Classifiers Predict Recurrence in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
papers.tldr: 本研究针对非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）术后复发预测的难题，提出了一种基于术前CT的生境影像组学分析方法。通过挖掘肿瘤内部不同区域的异质性特征，构建了复发预测分类器。结果表明，该模型能有效识别高复发风险患者，性能优于传统临床指标，为NSCLC患者的术前风险评估和个性化辅助治疗方案的制定提供了重要的影像学依据。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives Among surgically resected non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) patientswith similar stage and histopathological characteristics, there is variability in patientoutcomes which highlights urgency of identifying biomarkers to predict recurrence …

papers.title_en: Multi-Institutional Annotated Multiparametric MRI Dataset of Pediatric High-Grade Gliomas
papers.tldr: 儿童脑肿瘤是儿童癌症死亡的主要原因，且与成人肿瘤在生物学上存在显著差异。本研究发布了一个多机构、经过专家标注的儿童高级别胶质瘤（pHGG）多参数磁共振成像（mpMRI）数据集。该数据集旨在解决儿童脑肿瘤研究中样本量小和标注缺失的问题，为开发和验证先进的医学影像分析算法（如自动分割和放射组学研究）提供了宝贵的数据支撑，对提升儿童脑肿瘤的临床诊疗水平具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Pediatric brain tumors are rare and still represent the most common solid tumors inchildren and the leading cause of cancer-related mortality in the pediatric population.Compared to adult brain tumors, they exhibit distinct biology, anatomy, and clinical …

papers.title_en: Joint training to improve report generation capability from longitudinal CT volumes with a vision‑language model
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了视觉语言模型（VLM）在从纵向CT影像自动生成日语放射报告中的应用。通过对比不同的训练策略，研究重点分析了联合训练对模型性能的影响。结果证明，优化的训练方法能显著提升报告生成的准确性与连贯性，为自动化临床诊断文档生成提供了重要的技术参考和改进方向。
papers.abstract_en: This study is to investigate how different training strategies affect the performance ofa VLM for the task of automatic Japanese radiology report generation fromComputed Tomography (CT) volumes. Automatically generating radiology reports …

papers.title_en: Medical Multimodal Large Language Models: A Survey
papers.tldr: 随着多模态大语言模型的发展，医疗多模态大语言模型（Medical MLLM）通过整合临床报告、医学影像和生理数据等多元信息应运而生。本文对该领域进行了全面综述，系统梳理了Medical MLLM的发展历程、核心技术架构、训练策略以及在临床诊断中的应用现状，并探讨了当前挑战与未来方向，为医疗AI研究提供了重要参考。
papers.abstract_en: In recent years, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have gradually givenrise to medical multimodal large language models (Medical MLLMs) through theintegration of multimodal data such as clinical reports, medical images, physiological …

papers.title_en: PeFoMed: Parameter efficient fine-tuning of multimodal large language models for medical CXR
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗胸部X光（CXR）影像分析，提出了PeFoMed框架，旨在通过参数高效微调（PEFT）技术将多模态大语言模型（MLLM）应用于医学领域。该方法在显著减少计算资源消耗和可训练参数量的同时，提升了模型在医学影像理解、病灶识别及报告生成方面的表现，为医疗AI模型的轻量化适配和专业化部署提供了有效方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) represent an evolutionary expansion inthe capabilities of traditional large language models, enabling them to tacklechallenges that surpass the scope of purely text-based applications. Recent works …

papers.title_en: Key concept learning for medical vision language model with reasoning capabilities
papers.tldr: 针对医疗视觉语言模型（VLM）训练中大规模图像-文本对获取困难的问题，本文提出了ConceptVLM。这是一种高效的微调框架，通过学习关键医学概念来增强模型的推理能力。该方法在显著减少数据依赖的同时，提升了模型在复杂医疗场景下的理解与逻辑推理表现，为受限数据环境下的医疗AI开发提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Training medical vision-language models (VLMs) typically demands millions ofimage-text pairs to achieve versatility and reasoning, posing significant challenges indata acquisition. We propose ConceptVLM, a novel data-efficient fine-tuning …

papers.title_en: Semi-supervised Segmentation Network Based on Prototype-Oriented Local Contrastive Learning for Pregnancy Tissue in MR Images
papers.tldr: 本研究针对剖宫产瘢痕妊娠（CSP）早期筛查的需求，提出了一种基于原型导向局部对比学习的半监督分割网络。针对医学影像标注成本高的问题，该方法通过引入局部对比学习机制，充分利用未标记的MR图像数据来增强特征的判别性。实验证明，该网络在妊娠组织分割任务中取得了高精度的结果，为临床监测和降低并发症风险提供了重要的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Cesarean scar pregnancy (CSP) is a severe form of ectopic pregnancy, where earlyscreening and monitoring are critical to reducing the risk of prolonged uterinebleeding and other serious complications. Accurate segmentation of pregnancy …

papers.title_en: Prompt collaboration with uncertainty modeling for semi-supervised medical image segmentation
papers.tldr: 针对医学图像分割中人工标注成本高昂的问题，本文提出了一种结合提示协作与不确定性建模的半监督学习框架。该方法利用Segment Anything Model (SAM) 的提示驱动能力，通过对预测结果进行不确定性建模，有效提升了伪标签的质量与模型训练的稳定性，在减少标注依赖的同时实现了高精度的分割性能。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning models for medical image segmentation typically require extensiveannotations that are labor-intensive to obtain. While the segment anything model(SAM) has been adopted to facilitate semi-supervised learning via prompt-driven …

papers.title_en: Pro-Tuning: Prototype Tuning of Foundation Models for Volumetric Medical Image Segmentation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对三维医学图像分割任务，提出了Pro-Tuning（原型微调）框架，旨在高效地将大规模基础模型适配到特定的临床场景。该方法通过引入原型学习机制，能够有效捕捉解剖结构的本质特征，在显著降低可训练参数量的同时，提升了模型在处理复杂体积数据时的分割精度和鲁棒性，为医学影像基础模型的应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate volumetric medical image segmentation plays a crucial role in identifyingand analyzing human organs, tissues, or areas of lesions. It serves as a criticalfoundation for clinical diagnosis and treatment planning, guides surgical procedures …

papers.title_en: Radiomics-based outcome prediction for irinotecan-TACE in colorectal liver metastases: advanced analysis from the prospective CIREL trial
papers.tldr: 本研究基于前瞻性CIREL临床试验，旨在解决不可切除结直肠癌肝转移（CRLM）患者在接受伊立替康栓塞化疗（TACE）时筛选困难的问题。研究开发并验证了基于影像组学的机器学习模型，用于预测患者的预后结果。该研究通过分析影像特征，为优化TACE治疗的患者选择提供了量化工具，有助于实现更精准的个体化治疗方案。
papers.abstract_en: Objectives Transarterial chemoembolization (TACE) is a promising locoregionaltherapy for unresectable colorectal liver metastases, but patient selection remainschallenging. We aimed to develop and validate prognostic radiomics-based machine …

papers.title_en: The diagnostic performance of the YEARS and PEGeD algorithms in patients with prior venous thrombosis suspected of pulmonary embolism
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估 YEARS 和 PEGeD 诊断算法在既往有静脉血栓栓塞（VTE）病史且疑似肺栓塞患者中的临床表现。由于此类患者的诊断证据较少，研究重点分析了 3 个月随访期间的诊断漏诊率以及算法在减少影像检查方面的效率。结果为临床医生在处理具有血栓病史的疑似肺栓塞患者时，提供了关于算法安全性和有效性的关键参考。
papers.abstract_en: Background Evidence on how diagnostic algorithms perform in patients with priorvenous thromboembolism (VTE) is scarce. Research objectives Determine thediagnostic miss-rate during 3-month follow-up and the proportion of avoided imaging …

papers.title_en: See Fair, Speak Truth: Equitable Attention Improves Grounding and Reduces Hallucination in Vision-Language Alignment
papers.tldr: 针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）中常见的幻觉问题，本研究指出解码过程中注意力往往过度集中于视觉显著或高频内容。为此，作者提出了“公平注意力”机制，通过优化视觉与语言的对齐，使模型能够更均衡地处理视觉输入，从而在提高目标定位准确性的同时，显著减少幻觉现象的发生。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently hallucinate objects that areabsent from the visual input, often because attention during decoding isdisproportionately drawn to visually dominant or frequently occurring content. We …

papers.title_en: Bringing Value Models Back: Generative Critics for Value Modeling in LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型（LLM）强化学习中的信用分配难题，重新引入了价值模型。传统方法在处理复杂文本生成时难以进行细粒度的优势估计，导致学习效率低下。本文提出了“生成式评论家”（Generative Critics）方法，通过生成式建模来构建价值函数，从而实现更精准的优势估计。该方法有效提升了LLM在强化学习过程中的性能，证明了在现代LLM训练中回归并优化经典Actor-Critic架构的必要性与潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Credit assignment is a central challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Classicalactor-critic methods address this challenge through fine-grained advantageestimation based on a learned value function. However, learned value models are …

papers.title_en: A Mechanistic Analysis of Looped Reasoning Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对通过在潜空间循环层结构来提升大语言模型推理能力的“循环推理模型”进行了深入的机理分析。背景是推理已成为LLM的核心能力，而循环结构被证明能有效增强性能。本文通过机械论分析方法，探讨了这些模型在处理复杂推理任务时的内部运作机制，揭示了循环层如何通过迭代优化表示来提升逻辑推导的准确性，为理解和优化循环架构提供了理论支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Reasoning has become a central capability in large language models. Recentresearch has shown that reasoning performance can be improved by looping anLLM's layers in the latent dimension, resulting in looped reasoning language models …

papers.title_en: PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation
papers.tldr: 该研究针对血液病理学中外周血涂片（PBS）全切片图像的解释挑战，提出了PBSBench框架。PBS解释侧重于个体细胞形态而非组织结构，该工作构建了一个多层级的视觉语言基准，旨在通过多尺度特征融合提升PBS图像的自动化分析与理解能力，为血液病诊断提供有力支持。
papers.abstract_en: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination inhematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissuepathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than …

papers.title_en: WebCompass: Towards Multimodal Web Coding Evaluation for Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 随着大语言模型向端到端 Web 编程智能体演进，现有基准测试仅关注文本生成和静态指标，无法全面评估其多模态交互能力。本文提出 WebCompass，一个针对代码语言模型的多模态 Web 编程评估基准，旨在通过更复杂的交互场景和多模态输入，全面衡量模型在实际网页开发中的表现，填补了现有评估体系的空白。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are rapidly evolving into interactive coding agents capableof end-to-end web coding, yet existing benchmarks evaluate only narrow slices ofthis capability, typically text-conditioned generation with static-correctness metrics …

papers.title_en: Pause or Fabricate? Training Language Models for Grounded Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在处理信息不全的任务时容易产生“幻觉”并编造虚假结论的问题，探讨了如何训练模型进行扎实的推理。通过引导模型在推理过程中识别缺失信息并适时“暂停”而非盲目推导，显著提升了模型在复杂推理任务中的可靠性。该研究为减少模型虚假输出、增强推理过程的严谨性提供了重要的方法论支持。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models have achieved remarkable progress on complex reasoningtasks. However, they often implicitly fabricate information when inputs areincomplete, producing confident but unreliable conclusions--a failure mode we term …

papers.title_en: VLA Foundry: A Unified Framework for Training Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.tldr: VLA Foundry 是一个开源框架，旨在统一大语言模型（LLM）、视觉语言模型（VLM）和视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）的训练流程。针对目前 VLA 研究中预训练管线不兼容的问题，该框架提供了一套集成的代码库，简化了从基础模型到动作执行的训练过程，为机器人学习和多模态智能体研究提供了高效、统一的工具。
papers.abstract_en: We present VLA Foundry, an open-source framework that unifies LLM, VLM, andVLA training in a single codebase. Most open-source VLA efforts specialize on theaction training stage, often stitching together incompatible pretraining pipelines. VLA …

papers.title_en: Clinically-Informed Modeling for Pediatric Brain Tumor Classification from Whole-Slide Histopathology Images
papers.tldr: 针对儿科脑肿瘤病理诊断中数据稀缺、类别不平衡及形态重叠等挑战，本研究提出了一种结合临床先验知识的深度学习建模方法。通过在全视野数字化切片（WSI）分类中融入临床信息，该方法有效提升了细粒度病理图像的分类性能，为辅助医生进行精准诊断提供了可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate diagnosis of pediatric brain tumors, starting with histopathology, presentsunique challenges for deep learning, including severe data scarcity, classimbalance, and fine-grained morphologic overlap across diagnostically distinct …

papers.title_en: Fine-Grained Analysis of Shared Syntactic Mechanisms in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了语言模型内部机制与语言学跨结构原则的一致性。通过对模型处理不同句法构造时的内部表示进行细粒度分析，研究者评估了模型是否在不同任务间共享句法处理路径。结果表明，模型在处理相关句法结构时表现出显著的机制重叠，证明了其具备抽象的句法泛化能力。这一发现为理解大模型的语言习得机制提供了新视角，并验证了其内部表征与语言学理论的关联。
papers.abstract_en: While language models demonstrate sophisticated syntactic capabilities, the extentto which their internal mechanisms align with cross-constructional principles studiedin linguistics remains poorly understood. This study investigates whether models …

papers.title_en: CT-FineBench: A Diagnostic Fidelity Benchmark for Fine-Grained Evaluation of CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对CT报告生成中评估困难的问题，提出了CT-FineBench基准。该基准专注于诊断忠实度，通过细粒度的疾病属性评估，解决了传统方法在处理复杂医学发现和大量文本时的局限性，为提升CT报告自动生成的准确性提供了更可靠的评价体系。
papers.abstract_en: The evaluation of generated reports remains a critical challenge in ComputedTomography (CT) report generation, due to the large volume of text, the diversity andcomplexity of findings, and the presence of fine-grained, disease-oriented attributes …

papers.title_en: Learning from Medical Entity Trees: An Entity-Centric Medical Data Engineering Framework for MLLMs
papers.tldr: 本研究针对多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在医疗领域因数据组织粗糙（按模态或科室划分）而受限的问题，提出了一种以实体为中心的医疗数据工程框架。该框架通过构建“医疗实体树”来重新组织多模态数据，实现了更细粒度的知识关联与学习。实验证明，这种方法能显著提升模型在复杂医疗场景下的理解与推理能力，为医疗大模型的专业化数据建设提供了新方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown transformative potential inmedical applications, yet their performance is hindered by conventional data curationstrategies that rely on coarse-grained partitioning by modality or department. Such …

papers.title_en: CheXthought: A global multimodal dataset of clinical chain-of-thought reasoning and visual attention for chest X-ray interpretation
papers.tldr: 该研究推出了CheXthought数据集，旨在解决当前胸部X射线AI模型仅依赖图像-报告对而缺乏临床推理过程的问题。这是一个包含临床思维链（CoT）推理和视觉注意力标注的全球多模态数据集，通过整合医生的逻辑推导路径，为开发更具解释性和推理能力的医学视觉语言模型提供了关键资源。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-ray interpretation is one of the most frequently performed diagnostic tasks inmedicine and a primary target for AI development, yet current vision--languagemodels are primarily trained on datasets of paired images and reports, not the …
